Class CharVariable

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.variable.CharVariable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Variable<Character>
public class CharVariable extends Object implements Variable<Character>
A variable storing a char value.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    CharVariable(char initialValue)
    Constructs a CharVariable with the given initial value.

    CharVariable
    copy()
    Creates and returns a shallow copy of this variable.
    Character
    getValue()
    Deprecated.
    Please use getValueAsChar() instead.
    char
    getValueAsChar()
    Returns the current value of this variable.
    boolean
    is(Class<?> cls)
    Returns whether the current value of this variable can be exactly represented as the class represented by the given Class object.

    Sets the current value of this variable.
    void

    Please use setCharValue(char) instead.
    String

    Returns a string representation of the current value.

      public CharVariable(char initialValue)
      Constructs a CharVariable with the given initial value.

  • Method Details

    • getValueAsChar

      public char getValueAsChar()
      Returns the current value of this variable.
      Specified by:
      getValueAsChar in interface Variable<Character>
      Returns:
      the value

    • setCharValue

      public void setCharValue(char newValue)
      Sets the current value of this variable.
      Specified by:
      setCharValue in interface Variable<Character>
      Parameters:
      newValue - the new char value

    • is

      public boolean is(Class<?> cls)
      Returns whether the current value of this variable can be exactly represented as the class represented by the given Class object. Primitive classes should also be accepted.
      Specified by:
      is in interface Variable<Character>
      Parameters:
      cls - the class
      Returns:
      true if the current value is an instance of the given class, false otherwise

    • copy

      public CharVariable copy()
      Creates and returns a shallow copy of this variable. The copy should not reflect changes to the source Variable, however, the value's state may be shared.
      Specified by:
      copy in interface Variable<Character>
      Returns:
      a copy of this variable

    • getValue

      @Deprecated public Character getValue()
      Deprecated.
      Please use getValueAsChar() instead.
      Returns the current value of this variable.
      Specified by:
      getValue in interface Variable<Character>
      Returns:
      the value

    • setValue

      @Deprecated public void setValue(Character newValue)
      Deprecated.
      Please use setCharValue(char) instead.
      Sets the value of this variable to the given one.
      Specified by:
      setValue in interface Variable<Character>
      Parameters:
      newValue - the new value

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the current value.
